settings.subtitle: Aloe Vera + Niacinamide
settings.description: A lightweight, brightening serum designed to deliver a glass-skin finish. Infused with Aloe Vera and Niacinamide to hydrate, refine texture, and boost radiance for a naturally luminous glow.
settings.key_ingredients: Aloe Vera, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Hyaluronic Acid, Centella Asiatica, Green Tea Extract, Honey.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All skin types wanting a hydrated, glass-skin glow

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A refreshing, weightless gel that absorbs instantly

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Dewy, luminous skin with a smooth, refined texture

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: Fresh, light botanical scent with hints of aloe

settings.title: A dewy brightening serum for GLASS-SKIN + INSTANT GLOW.
NIACINAMIDE
settings.description: a multitasking ingredient that helps visibly even out skin tone, reduce the look of pores, and strengthen the skin barrier for a smoother, clearer complexion

settings.title: ALPHA ARBUTIN
settings.description: a targeted brightening active known to help fade dark spots, post-acne marks, and discoloration for a more uniform, radiant look over time

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: A powerful blend of tone-correcting actives and skin-repairing hydrators designed to target dullness, uneven tone, and texture. Here are 2 key ingredients behind the glow transformation:
settings.footer_text: also made with VITAMIN C, HYALURONIC ACID, ALOE VERA, ROSE EXTRACT, VITAMIN E, HONEY, PEPTIDES, CENTELLA ASIATICA, VITAMIN B5, WITCH HAZEL

settings.description: SAID THEIR SKIN LOOKED BRIGHTER + MORE EVEN
SAID DARK SPOTS APPEARED VISIBLY REDUCED
SAID THEIR SKIN FELT SMOOTHER + MORE REFINED
SAID THEY NOTICED A HEALTHY, GLASS-LIKE GLOW

settings.footnote: Based on a 2-week consumer perception study with consistent daily use.

settings.question: When should I apply the Glow Serum?
settings.answer: Apply morning and night after cleansing and toning, and before your moisturizer.

settings.question: Can I use it under makeup?
settings.answer: Yes, it creates a perfect dewy base for makeup application.

settings.question: Is it suitable for oily skin?
settings.answer: Yes, its lightweight, water-based formula provides hydration without oiliness.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: You'll notice an instant glow; visible texture improvement typically appears within 2-4 weeks.

settings.question: Does it help with acne marks?
settings.answer: Yes, Niacinamide is excellent for fading the appearance of post-acne marks and redness.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Discover everything you need for that glass-skin finish.
